case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TAX COLLECTOR VS. QUINN CHILTON

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2016 - JUDGMENT.
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CHILTON, QUINN NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHILTON, QUINN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,511.94 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CHILTON, QUINN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CHILTON, QUINN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.99) SERVED NOV-14-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHILTON, QUINN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-06-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CHILTON, QUINN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHILTON, QUINN $5,045.99 PRINCIPAL, $2,511.94 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,557.93

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TAX COLLECTOR SERVED DEC-31-2025, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT CHILTON, QUINN PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON MAR-09-2026 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
